title: Australia芒鈧劉s National Hydrogen Strategy 2024
content: The Australian government published its National Hydrogen Strategy, which places the spotlight on green hydrogen and the steps the country will need to take in order to produce it and deliver it at scale in a sustainable way. Australia plans to pour US$15 billion into green hydrogen in the next decade. This will position Australia to become a global hydrogen leader.
author: Analysts Account
source: Department of Climate Change, Energy, Environment and Water (DCCEEW) - Australian Government
